name: plugin_runtime
documentation:
Small helpers for workspace-aware plugins.

## API Reference

### workspace_root
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: workspace_root(request: dict[str, Any]) -> Path

Return the workspace root path from a plugin execution request.

### params
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: params(request: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]

Return request parameters as a dictionary.

### result
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: result(request: dict[str, Any], data: dict[str, Any], *, decision: str = 'continue', patch: dict[str, Any] | None = None, response: str | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]

Shape plugin output for either stage execution or direct call mode.

### ensure_safe_name
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: ensure_safe_name(name: str, label: str = 'name') -> str

Validate a plugin or library identifier and return it unchanged.

### PluginWorkspaceStorage
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class PluginWorkspaceStorage

Workspace-relative file helper for plugins that create or inspect files.

### workspace_storage
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: workspace_storage(request: dict[str, Any]) -> PluginWorkspaceStorage

Return a workspace storage helper for the current plugin request.

### iter_plugin_manifests
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: iter_plugin_manifests(root: Path) -> Iterable[dict[str, Any]]

Yield plugin manifest dictionaries from a workspace root.

### load_plugin_manifest
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: load_plugin_manifest(root: Path, name: str) -> dict[str, Any]

Load a named plugin manifest from a workspace root.

### iter_library_manifests
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: iter_library_manifests(root: Path) -> Iterable[dict[str, Any]]

Yield library manifest dictionaries from a workspace root.

### load_library_manifest
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: load_library_manifest(root: Path, name: str) -> dict[str, Any]

Load a named library manifest from a workspace root.
